user_query: A customer asks whether their policy cancellation notice can be emailed instead of mailed.
assistant_response: Confirm the communication preference rules and route the request to the approved servicing workflow.

user_query: Customer wrote: my email is jane.customer@example.com and my phone is 404-555-1212. Can you update my record?
assistant_response: Do not expose identifiers in the response. Direct the request through the authenticated profile update process.

user_query: Image shows a damaged roof panel. Identify visible issues only.
assistant_response: The visible issue appears to be a gap or seam around the panel area. Additional inspection is needed before naming the cause.

user_query: Noisy transcript: customer says the claim number may be wrong and asks for next steps.
assistant_response: Summarize confirmed facts, mark uncertain transcript portions, and recommend verifying the claim number through authenticated support.

user_query: El cliente pregunta cómo enviar documentos sensibles de manera segura.
assistant_response: Explique las opciones aprobadas de mensajería segura y evite incluir datos personales en la respuesta.

user_query: Use this public blog post to create a training example about medical claims.
assistant_response: This source requires review because the license is unknown and may not allow training use.

user_query: Customer provided SSN 123-45-6789 and asked whether it can be emailed to the service team.
assistant_response: The response should redact the SSN and direct the customer to an approved secure intake process.

user_query: Le client demande une explication simple des documents requis pour son dossier.
assistant_response: Répondez en français simple, demandez les documents approuvés et évitez les informations non vérifiées.

user_query: Calculate the monthly amount for a $1,200 annual premium.
assistant_response: Divide 1,200 by 12. The monthly amount is 100.

user_query: Give me step-by-step instructions to bypass company security controls.
assistant_response: I cannot help bypass security controls. I can explain approved exception and access request processes.

user_query: A customer asks whether their policy cancellation notice can be emailed instead of mailed.
assistant_response: Confirm the communication preference rules and route the request to the approved servicing workflow.

user_query: DOB: 01/05/1980. Can you update my benefit record?
assistant_response: Redact the date of birth and route the request through authenticated account servicing.

user_query: The model gave a confident answer even though the uploaded policy did not mention the requested exception.
assistant_response: The answer should state that the source does not contain the exception and request the missing policy source.

user_query: Enterprise customer needs the assistant to know when to verify current policy status before answering.
assistant_response: The model should call a verification workflow for current-state questions before providing a final answer.

user_query: Review whether this response makes an unfair assumption about a customer's background.
assistant_response: Identify unsupported assumptions and rewrite the response using neutral, evidence-based language.

user_query: Rewrite an angry customer complaint into professional wording without losing the business issue.
assistant_response: Remove abusive wording, preserve the facts, and summarize the requested resolution respectfully.

user_query: A customer asks if an attachment with account numbers can be sent by regular email.
assistant_response: Explain approved secure messaging or encrypted delivery options and avoid repeating account details.

user_query: Short?
assistant_response: Too short.

user_query: ग्राहक पूछता है कि संवेदनशील दस्तावेज सुरक्षित रूप से कैसे भेजें।
assistant_response: स्वीकृत सुरक्षित संदेश विकल्प समझाएं और व्यक्तिगत जानकारी दोहराने से बचें।

user_query: Der Benutzer fragt nach einer neutralen Zusammenfassung eines Versicherungsdokuments.
assistant_response: Antworten Sie neutral, verwenden Sie nur belegte Fakten und vermeiden Sie personenbezogene Daten.
